race.comment: DOOR BUSTER (4) was strong fresh at Belmont before running a strong race in tougher company last time out. Things look to set up nicely here and running in Saturday grade last time highlights what the stable think of her. Can return to winning ways coming back in grade. MAMMA SAYS SO (7) was too good over 1200m at Pinjarra last time out when running over the top to score. Back to 1000m is a query, but she's off a freshen and the form out of her last start worked out well. Can go on with the job without surprising. PAINT IT RED (6) is a lightly raced filly on resumption who showed glimpses before tackling Saturday grade before the break. Comes here without a trial, but Parnham riding is a good push for her chances. Can feature in the finish. SHE'S CAPITANA (8) is some niggle at the barrier but she'll be storming home late in the race. ENCHANTED STAR (5) will be better over further, though this presents as a good starting point.
